description: Release signal dataset — drives the 'What's New' homepage section

entries.changelog: Unified generative AI fabric combining foundation model orchestration, RAG pipelines, and enterprise governance in one managed platform. Deploy fine-tuned models or connect any provider — OpenAI, Anthropic, or self-hosted.
entries.changelog_summary: Unified generative AI, RAG, and model orchestration for enterprise deployments

entries.changelog: AI Contract Review auto-extracts clauses, flags risks, compares against your standard terms, and generates redlines — reducing contract review time by ~70% with full audit trail.
entries.changelog_summary: AI contract review with risk flagging and auto-redline — 70% faster

entries.changelog: Cloud Cost AI Optimizer continuously rightsizes your AWS, GCP, and Azure spend using predictive ML, auto-applying savings recommendations with approval gates.
entries.changelog_summary: Predictive ML continuously rightsizes AWS/GCP/Azure spend with auto-apply savings

entries.changelog: 24/7 AI Customer Support Agent with multi-channel sync (email, chat, phone), sentiment-aware escalation, and CRM writeback — reduces resolution time by 60%.
entries.changelog_summary: 24/7 multi-channel AI support with sentiment-aware escalation and CRM writeback

entries.changelog: Zero Trust Architecture service redesigns your network perimeter with identity-first access, micro-segmentation, and continuous verification — meeting NIST SP 800-207 and Zero Trust Maturity Model Level 3+ criteria.
entries.changelog_summary: Identity-first network redesign meeting NIST ZT Level 3+ criteria

entries.changelog: Unified Observability Platform merges logs, metrics, traces, and APM into a single pane of glass with AI-powered anomaly detection and auto-root-cause analysis.
entries.changelog_summary: Unified logs/metrics/traces/APM with AI anomaly detection and RCA
